title_en: Tabled cabinet notes alleging cabinet was misled on health board dismissal
description_en: A former Infrastructure Minister, sitting as an Independent, tabled handwritten cabinet-committee notes and a letter to the Auditor General in the Legislature. The materials allege that the stated rationale for dismissing the Alberta Health Services board omitted an ongoing procurement investigation and a former chief executive's allegations. The Premier responded in Question Period that no one was misled.
verification_notes: The tabled record (Hansard / Standing Order) is the underlying primary; confirm the tabling date and include the government's response on the same record. Note the authenticity of the notes was not disputed by government.

update_log.change: Created from harvest batch; suppressed pending verification.
